name: Shaco

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Backstab
passive.description_source: Innate:  Shaco's basic attacks deal bonus physical damage when hitting an enemy from behind.

effects.description: Innate: Shaco's basic attacks are empowered to deal 20 : 31.18 (based on level) (+ 20% bonus AD) bonus physical damage when hitting an enemy from behind. This damage is affected by critical strike modifiers.
Deceive and Two-Shiv Poison have additional effects when they hit an enemy from behind.

passive.description: Innate: Shaco's basic attacks are empowered to deal 20 : 31.18 (based on level) (+ 20% bonus AD) bonus physical damage when hitting an enemy from behind. This damage is affected by critical strike modifiers.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Backstab's bonus damage adds to the damage instance of the original basic attack.

basic_ability_1.name: Deceive
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Shaco becomes  invisible for a short time and  blinks to the target location.

effects.context_notes: Active: Shaco becomes invisible for a duration, and after a 0.

effects.description: Deceive's invisibility breaks when Shaco uses a basic attack or casts Two-Shiv Poison, but not from casting Jack in the Box or Hallucinate.

effects.context_notes: After breaking the invisibility, Shaco empowers his next basic attack within 0.25 seconds.

effects.description: Backstab Bonus: The attack will critically strike for (160% + 18%) damage, increased to (200% + 30%) if a critical strike was rolled.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Shaco becomes invisible for a duration, and after a 0.125-second delay, he blinks to the target location.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): If the attack would have already critically struck based on Shaco's critical strike chance, the base Backstab critical damage modifier will be overridden by the default critical damage modifier.

Manual review (2026-02-25): Deceive resolves in two phases: blink/invisibility occurs on cast, then bonus-damage critical strike behavior resolves on the first post-stealth empowered basic-attack hit.

basic_ability_2.name: Jack in the Box
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Shaco summons a box at the target location that becomes  stealthed after a short time.

effects.description: Active: Shaco summons a box at the target location that becomes stealthed after arming over 2 seconds, lasting for up to 40 (+ 10% AP) seconds. The box is invulnerable and untargetable to enemies while stealthed.

effects.context_notes: The box will spring out upon enemy contact, fearing nearby enemies for a duration, modified to 2.
The box will spring out upon enemy contact, fearing nearby enemies for a duration, modified to 2.
The box will spring out upon enemy contact, fearing nearby enemies for a duration, modified to 2.
Once sprung, the box will remain for 5 seconds, during which it will automatically fire at nearby visible enemies every 0.5 seconds.
Once sprung, the box will remain for 5 seconds, during which it will automatically fire at nearby visible enemies every 0.5 seconds.
Once sprung, the box will remain for 5 seconds, during which it will automatically fire at nearby visible enemies every 0.5 seconds.
Once sprung, the box will remain for 5 seconds, during which it will automatically fire at nearby visible enemies every 0.5 seconds.
Once sprung, the box will remain for 5 seconds, during which it will automatically fire at nearby visible enemies every 0.5 seconds.

effects.description: See Pets for more details about boxes.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Shaco summons a box at the target location that becomes stealthed after arming over 2 seconds, lasting for up to 40 (+ 10% AP) seconds. The box is invulnerable and untargetable to enemies while stealthed.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The root and fear are applied at the same time.

basic_ability_3.name: Two-Shiv Poison
basic_ability_3.description_source: Passive: While Two-Shiv Poison is not on cooldown,  Shaco's basic attacks will  slow enemies for a short time.

effects.context_notes: Passive: Shaco's basic attacks slow enemies for 2 seconds while Two-Shiv Poison is not on cooldown.
Active: Shaco throws a dagger at the target enemy that deals magic damage, increased by 50% if they are below 30% of their maximum health, and slows them for 3 seconds.
Active: Shaco throws a dagger at the target enemy that deals magic damage, increased by 50% if they are below 30% of their maximum health, and slows them for 3 seconds.
Active: Shaco throws a dagger at the target enemy that deals magic damage, increased by 50% if they are below 30% of their maximum health, and slows them for 3 seconds.

effects.description: Backstab Bonus: The dagger deals an additional 15 : 54.12 (based on level) (+ 10% AP) bonus magic damage, increased to 22.5 : 81.18 (based on level) (+ 15% AP) if the target is below 30% of their maximum health.

basic_ability_3.description: Passive: Shaco's basic attacks slow enemies for 2 seconds while Two-Shiv Poison is not on cooldown.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Shaco replicates the last attack animation he performed for Two-Shiv Poison's animation.

ultimate.name: Hallucinate
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Shaco briefly  vanishes and  blinks in the target direction, creating a  clone of himself for some time.

effects.description: Active: Shaco vanishes for 0.5 seconds and blinks in the target direction while creating a clone of himself that is summoned in the opposite direction, remaining within control range of him as a controllable clone for up to 18 seconds. Hallucinate can be recast at any time while the clone is alive, and can be used while affected by cast-inhibiting crowd control.
Recast: Shaco commands the clone to move to the target location.

effects.context_notes: The clone will explode upon dying or expiring to deal magic damage to nearby enemies and deploy three mini-boxes that activate instantly, fearing nearby enemies for 1 second, increased to 2.
The boxes possess Jack in the Box's effects, except they have a doubled, but shared health, and deal modified magic damage with each attack, increased when attacking a single unit.
The boxes possess Jack in the Box's effects, except they have a doubled, but shared health, and deal modified magic damage with each attack, increased when attacking a single unit.

effects.description: See Pets for more details about Shaco's clone.

ultimate.description: Active: Shaco vanishes for 0.5 seconds and blinks in the target direction while creating a clone of himself that is summoned in the opposite direction, remaining within control range of him as a controllable clone for up to 18 seconds. Hallucinate can be recast at any time while the clone is alive, and can be used while affected by cast-inhibiting crowd control.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): If the explosion hits at least one minion, the boxes will fear all enemies regardless of their unit type for 2.2 seconds.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)
sources.used_for: manual behavior verification for Deceive two-phase blink/stealth flow and empowered-hit strike resolution timing

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
